Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2008 season comes to a close with all the racing action from Monster Jam World Finals 9 on March 29, 2008.
Video.title: World Finals IX - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Image.alt: World Finals IX - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals IX - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing
World Finals IX - Sam Boyd Stadium - Las Vegas, NV - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam makes its way to Metlife Stadium with all the freestyle action on April 23, 2016.
Video.title: Metlife Stadium - Rutherford, NJ - Freestyle

Video.summary: All the Monster Jam triple threat action from the Sprint Center on January 18, 2020!
Video.title: Sprint Center - Kansas City, MO

Video.summary: The fans are here and ready for freestyle action from Alltel Stadium, on February 26, 2005.
Video.title: Alltel Stadium - Jacksonville, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Don't miss the epic Monster Jam freestyle action from M&T Bank Stadium, on June 2, 2012.
Video.title: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Freestyle

Image.alt: M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Freestyle
M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Freestyle
M&T Bank Stadium - Baltimore, MD - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam visits Tampa, Florida!
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL

Video.summary: For the first time ever in Texas, the most extreme Monster Trucks compete for the freestyle win at Reliant Stadium in Houston, TX.
Video.title: Reliant Stadium - Houston, TX - Freestyle

Video.summary: Watch an incredible night of freestyle from the Citrus Bowl in Orlando, FL, on January 26, 2008.
Video.title: Citrus Bowl - Orlando, FL - Freestyle

Video.summary: Don't miss the thrills and excitement of racing action from Raymond James Stadium, on February 6, 2010.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Video.summary: Get ready for Monster Jam freestyle action at Ford Field in Detroit, MI, on January 19, 2008.
Video.title: Ford Field - Detroit, MI - Freestyle

Video.summary: History is made with Monster Jam's first visit to US Bank Stadium!
Video.title: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Image.alt: US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN - Racing
US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN - Racing
US Bank Stadium - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Buckle up for some exciting Monster Jam racing action from the Mercedes-Benz Superdome on February 23, 2013.
Video.title: Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Racing

Image.alt: Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Racing
Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Racing
Mercedes-Benz Superdome - New Orleans, LA - Racing

Video.summary: Racing into Glendale, AZ, Monster Jam's 2021 season sees more monster truck fun!
Video.title: State Farm Stadium - Glendale, AZ

Video.summary: The fun continues with the freestyle action from Olympic Stadium, on October 30, 2004.
Video.title: Olympic Stadium - Montreal, Quebec - Freestyle

Video.summary: The Monster Jam 2021 Stadium Championship Series continues another day at AT&T Stadium in Arlington, TX.
Video.title: AT&T Stadium - Arlington, TX

Video.summary: Monster Jam returns to Lucas Oil Stadium as Tom Meents continues his final season of Maximum Destruction looking for his league leading fifth freestyle win, but will Tyler Menninga disappoint Max-D fans as he goes for his seventh event championship of the year.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: In the Stadium Championship Series Red finale, Series Champion, Adam Anderson looks to finish strong and lead Grave Digger to his 10th event win of the season. Tom Meents, Bryce Kenny, Kayla Blood, and Todd LeDuc battle it out to finish in the Top-5 of the Red Series.
Video.title: MetLife Stadium - East Rutherford, NJ

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2009 season kicks off with exciting racing action from the HHH Metrodome on December 6, 2008.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Racing

Video.summary: Monster Jam keeps on rockin' in this country town with freestyle.
Video.title: Nissan Stadium - Nashville, TN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Check out all the racing and freestyle action from the Saturday Night show at NRG Stadium on February 13, 2021 during Monster Jam's 2021 season!
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: What goes up must come down- and that means carnage! Ten monster trucks attempt to make history or be history during the freestyle action at the Metrodome.
Video.title: Metrodome - Minneapolis, MN - Freestyle

Video.summary: Monster Jam heads to Tampa, FL with racing action from Raymond James Stadium on January 17, 2014.
Video.title: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Image.alt: Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing
Raymond James Stadium - Tampa, FL - Racing

Video.summary: The drivers head to Texas to compete for tonight's trophy.
Video.title: NRG Stadium - Houston, TX

Video.summary: It's Day 2 of the 2025 World Finals from Salt Lake City, Utah!
Video.title: Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT - World Finals XXIIII - Day 2

Image.alt: Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT - World Finals XXIIII - Day 2
Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT - World Finals XXIIII - Day 2
Rice-Eccles Stadium - Salt Lake City, UT - World Finals XXIIII - Day 2

Video.summary: Indianapolis gets a visit from Monster Jam Primetime with all your favorite trucks and drivers.
Video.title: Lucas Oil Stadium - Indianapolis, IN

Video.summary: Primetime visits Stadium Championship Series East down in southern California for Round 4.
Video.title: Snapdragon Stadium - San Diego, CA

Video.summary: Monster Jam's Arena Series in 25 continues with round 19 at PPG Paints Arena in Pittsburgh, PA.
Video.title: PPG Paints Arena - Pittsburgh, PA

Video.summary: Monster Jam's Arena Series in 25 continues at the Huntington Center in Toledo, OH.
Video.title: Huntington Center - Toledo, OH

Video.summary: Monster Jam's 2014 season at Everbank Field in Jacksonville, FL featuring Semi Finals race
Video.title: Everbank Field - Jacksonville, FL

Video.summary: Monster Jam goes to Holland! The Gelredome, in Arnhem hosts as Team Marvel and Team Destruction go head to head.
Video.title: Gelredome - Arnhem, Holland

Video.summary: Arena Championship Series Central takes moves into the Ford Center in downtown Evansville, Indiana for the series finale featuring the return of Monster Jam legend, Jon Zimmer Sr. in Wild Side. Grave Digger’s Brandon Vinson looks to end the season with another championship before competing at World Finals XXII in Nashville.
Video.title: Ford Center - Evansville, IN
